stemHtml: Regulation (EC) No 300/2008 establishes common rules to protect civil aviation against acts of unlawful interference that jeopardise the security of civil aviation. Who does this regulation apply to?

options.a: All airports or parts of airports located in the territory of a member state, except for those used exclusively for military purposes.
options.b: All (parts of) airports, including those used exclusively for military purposes, located in the territory of a member state.
options.c: Airside movement areas of an airport only.
